name: @veomuse/root
description: VeoMuse V3.1 Pro - Flagship AI Video Bus (Bun Monorepo Root)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "bun run --cwd apps/backend dev" "bun run --cwd apps/frontend dev"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd apps/backend build && bun run --cwd apps/frontend build
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/shared lint && bun run --cwd apps/backend lint
